title: Image Resize
summary: Resizes images to specified dimensions with optional format conversion
when_to_use: When you need to resize, crop, or convert image formats. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, TIFF.
when_not_to_use: Not suitable for video frames or animated GIFs. Use 'video.frame.extract' for video content.

tunable_parameters.name: quality
tunable_parameters.description: Output quality (1-100, applicable to lossy formats)

tunable_parameters.name: preserve_aspect_ratio
tunable_parameters.description: Maintain original aspect ratio (may adjust dimensions)

result_interpretation: On success, result.output_path contains the resized image. Check result.width and result.height for actual dimensions (may differ from requested if preserve_aspect_ratio is true).
